resources.string:
How to use

Setup
1. Tap [Step 1. Enable %1$s].
2. Turn on %1$s in the keyboard settings.
3. Press Back to return to this app.
4. Tap [Step 2. Select %1$s].
5. Select %1$s as the input method.

Scan
1. Open the app or screen where you want to enter text. Example: Chrome.
2. Tap the input field where the code text should be entered.
3. Tap [%2$s] on the %1$s keyboard.
4. Scan the QR code or Data Matrix code.
5. The scanned text will be entered into the selected input field.
6. When you finish using the custom keyboard, tap [%3$s] to switch back to your previous keyboard.
Scanning failed repeatedly. Returning to the main screen.
